series_metadata.series_description: Formerly FIS-03 (019-0003). This record series contains contracts between countries and cities, towns, and villages for provision of indigent defense services by the county in municipal ordiance cases. Pursuant to Section 120.33(A)(4), to be reimbursed

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain current contracts in the County Reimbursement operating area unless or until a county submits a new contract. Retain previously effective or expired contracts in the County Reimbursement operating area until one year following the State Auditor's report on any and all reimbursement payments affected by the previous version of the contract, then destroy., Paper: Shred
